message.content:
Find the home page files in this Next.js FSD project. Look for:
1. app/(app)/(protected)/ or app/ directory structure - find the home/root page
2. src/pages-layer/ - find any home or landing page
3. Any existing home page components in src/widgets/ or src/features/

Working directory: /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe

List the key files found with their paths.

input.description: Find all files in home slice

content.text:
Perfect! Let me compile the complete findings:

## Home Page Files Found

Here are the key home page files in this Next.js FSD project:

### App Router Pages
1. **Root home page (public marketing):**
   - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(marketing)/page.tsx` — Thin wrapper that renders `HomePage`

### Pages Layer (FSD)
2. **Home page component:**
   - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/pages-layer/home/ui/home.tsx` — Page component that renders the `LandingPage` widget

### Widgets Layer (FSD)
3. **Landing page widget (main UI):**
   - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/landing-page/ui/landing-page.tsx` — Full landing page component with hero section, features, step cards, benefits, testimonials, etc.
   - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/landing-page/index.ts` — Barrel export for the landing page widget
   - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/landing-page/model/constants.ts` — Landing page constants (testimonials, benefits, features, pricing plans)

### Architecture Flow
The home page follows the FSD pattern:
- `app/(marketing)/page.tsx` → imports `HomePage` from `pages-layer/home`
- `pages-layer/home/ui/home.tsx` → imports `LandingPage` from `widgets/landing-page`
- `widgets/landing-page/ui/landing-page.tsx` — Contains the full landing page implementation with multiple sections (hero, benefits, features, steps, security, testimonials)

The landing page uses shared UI components like `Button`, `FeatureCard`, `StepCard`, and `TestimonialCard` from `src/shared/ui/`.
